name: Disable Windows Defender Functionalities Via Registry Keys
notes:
This rule detects when attackers disable Windows Defender functionalities via the windows registry

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: AlertIQ, Ján Trenčanský, frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
SIGMA Title: Disable Windows Defender Functionalities Via Registry Keys
SIGMA Description: Detects when attackers or tools disable Windows Defender functionalities via the windows registry


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
when the event matches ("Registry Key") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows defender\%' AQL filter query

when the event matches ((LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disablebehaviormonitoring' OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disableioavprotection' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disableonaccessprotection' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disablerealtimemonitoring' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disablescanonrealtimeenable' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\reporting\disableenhancednotifications' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\spynet\disableblockatfirstseen' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\disableantispyware' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\disableantivirus') AND LOWER("Registry Value Data")='dword (0x00000001)') OR ((LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\spynet\spynetreporting' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\spynet\submitsamplesconsent' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\mpengine\mpenablepus') AND LOWER("Registry Value Data") == 'dword (0x00000000)') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Disable Windows Defender Functionalities Via Registry Keys on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
AND when the event matches ("Registry Key") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows defender\%' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches ((LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disablebehaviormonitoring' OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disableioavprotection' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disableonaccessprotection' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disablerealtimemonitoring' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\real-time protection\disablescanonrealtimeenable' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\reporting\disableenhancednotifications' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\spynet\disableblockatfirstseen' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\disableantispyware' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\disableantivirus') AND LOWER("Registry Value Data")='dword (0x00000001)') OR ((LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\spynet\spynetreporting' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\spynet\submitsamplesconsent' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\mpengine\mpenablepus') AND LOWER("Registry Value Data") == 'dword (0x00000000)') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Disable Windows Defender Functionalities Via Registry Keys
Event description: Detects when attackers disable Windows Defender functionalities via the windows registr
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
